g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I store the API key securely in the browser?')
sendPrompt('How does the chat input component work in React?')
sendPrompt('How do I render the message list in React?')
sendPrompt('What state do I need to manage in my React chat app?')
sendPrompt('Why does the Anthropic API need full message history each request?')
sendPrompt('How do I call the Anthropic API from React with fetch?')
sendPrompt('What does the Anthropic API response look like?')
